exhibition.label: below threshold
exhibition.case: Two-book consensus 54.2% on the 0.5 line — Belgium's highest-floor SOT play on the board; confirmed starter, no minutes-veto pattern; possession edge vs. USA supports volume. Ref Makhadmeh confirmed, fouls not playable this tournament. T-90 lineup check (2026-07-06T23:01Z, ~59 min pre-kickoff): official USA and Belgium starting XIs confirmed via ESPN/FOX Sports/US Soccer — Trossard starts at LW. De Bruyne and Doku also confirmed starting despite both dropping off the PrizePicks board this run — confirms that dropoff was a market-coverage gap, not a lineup signal. No yellow-card suspension risk for Trossard (clean card, R16 knockout).
exhibition.layer_notes: Layer 2: inverted-LW-cuts-inside role transfers cleanly from Arsenal; no set-piece bump (De Bruyne owns dead balls). Layer 3: no sub-risk pattern found this tournament, no veto. Layer 4: no heat/altitude factor (Seattle, evening kickoff); Belgium expected to control ball vs. lower-seeded USA, mild lean toward volume holding up. Lineup status (T-90 final): CONFIRMED starting via official/press lineups — no bench kill.

exhibition.layer_notes: Layer 2: central-striker role transfers cleanly from club profile; Xhaka is primary penalty taker, Embolo backup only — no bump. Layer 3: no sub-risk pattern found this tournament, no veto. Layer 4: Switzerland's compact transition-based style caps team shot volume vs. a possession-heavy Colombia side — mild lean toward the under on teammates' volume props, doesn't touch Embolo's focal-scorer role.
